title: evaluation-result
description: The mechanical keep/discard decision for one GEPA candidate vs the incumbent (GEPA Phase 3). Eligibility gates are hard vetoes — any failure forces 'block' and no LLM judge note can override it. Only an eligible candidate reaches the utility rule: it is 'allow' if it adds at least one distinct clean confirmed coverage case, or preserves coverage at >=10% lower cost; otherwise 'probe'. Produced by tools/score-candidate.py.

eligibility.description: Every flag must be true for the candidate to be eligible; any false forces verdict=block.

false_discovery_zero.description: candidate invalid_accept_rate == 0; a regression here is a hard veto

no_protected_regression.description: every case the incumbent passed, the candidate still passes

single_mutation.description: candidate mutates only its one declared component

coverage.description: clean_confirmed_coverage keys (dedup_key space). new_distinct counts only keys the incumbent did NOT already cover — duplicate coverage does not count.

reduction_pct.description: percent cheaper than incumbent; >=10 required for a cost-only win

judge_note.description: ADVISORY ONLY. Recorded for the human reviewer; it can never change the mechanical verdict (a mechanical failure cannot be overridden by an LLM judge).
